items.title: What we know about the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel
items.dek: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.
items.body: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Korea's runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search
items.dek: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.

items.title: Singer D4vd arrested in connection with death of missing teen girl
items.dek: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.
